stance: Risk-on within mandate: momentum-led small-cap, tilt hard into rising analyst-revisions, cut the laggard tail.
experience_note: I am watching whether the strong-revision cluster actually delivers relative outperformance over the next 1-3 months against the names I cut. Pre-registered: if the names I am ADDING on rising revisions (HONASA, GUJGASLTD, NAZARA, CHAMBLFERT, EQUITASBNK, POONAWALLA, CLEANMAX, ENGINERSIN, CREDITACC, AIAENG, MARKSANS, IPCALAB) collectively underperform the laggard-tail names I EXITED (PRAJIND, NCC, EXIDEIND, APOLLOTYRE, ANANDRATHI, GRAPHITE) by more than a few percent over the next quarter, the revision tilt added no value this cycle and I should weight momentum and valuation more, ARM less. Because ARM IC is only ~0.05, I expect to be wrong on roughly half the individual names; the test is the cluster, not any one ticket. I am also watching small-cap momentum: if cross-sectional momentum re-disperses (z-scores widen), the right move next cycle is to re-lean on price momentum rather than revisions.
guardrail_notes: dropped 9 non-priceable/unknown ticker(s): SONACOMS, HFCL, ADANIGREEN, ADANIPOWER, ADANIENT, AUROPHARMA, EXICOM, AEGISLOG
